old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.3","title":"Keep local Announce out of remote state","description":"Make send_announce validate the local signed Announce and transmit it without processing it into the remote AnnounceProcessor.","acceptance_criteria":"Sending a local Announce has no remote table insertion or eviction side effects, including at capacity.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.567443359Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.567443359Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:06:49.658421817Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: send_announce now validates and transmits without processing local identity; reflected local Announces are rejected without remote state. Added full-capacity no-insertion/no-eviction regression and verified three-node flow.
